mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pcb_address (`ip`, port, torrent_id, last_report_progress, last_report_uploaded, tracking_uploaded_increase_total, rewind_counter, progress_difference_counter, first_time_seen, last_time_seen, downloader, ban_delay_window_end_at, fast_pcb_test_execute_at, last_torrent_completed_size) VALUES (#{ip}, #{port}, #{torrentId}, #{lastReportProgress}, #{lastReportUploaded}, #{trackingUploadedIncreaseTotal}, #{rewindCounter}, #{progressDifferenceCounter}, #{firstTimeSeen}, #{lastTimeSeen}, #{downloader}, #{banDelayWindowEndAt}, #{fastPcbTestExecuteAt}, #{lastTorrentCompletedSize}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_report_progress = VALUES(last_report_progress), last_report_uploaded = VALUES(last_report_uploaded), tracking_uploaded_increase_total = VALUES(tracking_uploaded_increase_total), rewind_counter = VALUES(rewind_counter), progress_difference_counter = VALUES(progress_difference_counter), first_time_seen = VALUES(first_time_seen), last_time_seen = VALUES(last_time_seen), ban_delay_window_end_at = VALUES(ban_delay_window_end_at), fast_pcb_test_execute_at = VALUES(fast_pcb_test_execute_at), last_torrent_completed_size = VALUES(last_torrent_completed_size)
